name: PACKAGING CORP OF AMERICA
business: PCA is the third largest producer of containerboard products and a leading producer of uncoated freesheet paper in North America. The company operates ten mills and 91 corrugated products manufacturing plants. PCA produces containerboard, corrugated packaging products including conventional shipping containers and multi-color boxes, and uncoated freesheet papers for office, printing, and converting.
sellsTo: meat, fresh fruit and vegetables, processed food, beverages

catalysts.event: Price increase for linerboard and medium effective March 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: We notified customers of a $70 per ton price increase for linerboard and medium effective March 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Wallula reconfiguration begins to benefit cost structure
catalysts.sentence: Our cost structure will begin to benefit from the Wallula reconfiguration late in the first quarter.
